vin.txid: ID of the transaction from which the input originates
vin.vout: (int) Index of the output in the previous transaction.
vin.scriptSig: Signature script used to authorize the input.
vin.txinwitness: Witness for the input (used in SegWit transactions, can be empty).

scriptPubKey.hex: Hexadecimal representation of the public script of the previous output

vin.private_key: Private key associated with the input (sensitive and should not be shared).

recipients: Array of recipient addresses for the transaction

outputs: Array of expected outputs for the sending transaction

vin.txid: ID of the transaction from which the input originates
vin.vout: (int) Index of the output in the previous transaction.
vin.scriptSig: Signature script used to authorize the input.
vin.txinwitness: Witness for the input (used in SegWit transactions, can be empty).

scriptPubKey.hex: Hexadecimal representation of the public script of the previous output

outputs: Array of outputs for the receiving transaction.
given.labels: Array of labels associated with the transaction (can be empty).

addresses: Array of expected sp addresses for receiving.
